agents.name: Regime Pulse
agents.philosophy: Univers BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, XRP sur 15m, 30m. Execution rapide avec recherche d opportunites directionnelles. Mode long only. Allocation adaptive selon le regime de marche.

agents.name: Momentum Guard
agents.philosophy: Univers BTC, ETH, SOL sur 1h, 4h. Approche equilibree entre momentum, reversion et gestion du risque. Mode long only. Allocation adaptive selon le regime de marche.

agents.name: Daily Executor
agents.philosophy: Univers BTC, ETH sur 15m. Approche equilibree entre momentum, reversion et gestion du risque. Mode long only. Strategies principales: breakout confirmation, trend follow, sentiment filter.

agents.name: Alpha Hunter
agents.philosophy: Univers BNB, XRP, BTC sur 15m, 1h, 4h. Execution rapide avec recherche d opportunites directionnelles. Mode long only. Strategies principales: trend follow, breakout confirmation, mean reversion.

agents.name: OU Mean Reversion
agents.philosophy: Univers BTC, ETH, BNB sur 15m, 1h. Priorite a la protection du capital et au controle du drawdown. Mode long only. Strategies principales: ou mean reversion, mean reversion, sentiment filter.

agents.name: Risky Scalper
agents.philosophy: Univers SOL, BNB, XRP, BTC sur 15m. Execution rapide avec recherche d opportunites directionnelles. Mode long only. Strategies principales: trend follow, breakout confirmation, mean reversion.

agents.name: Codex Operator
agents.philosophy: This agent is operated by Codex. Trade decisions are produced by Codex using the project skills pipeline.
agents.decision_owner_note: This agent is operated by Codex. Trade decisions are produced by Codex using the project skills pipeline.

agents.name: Codex Hyperliquid LS Core
agents.philosophy: Codex manages long/short signals and portfolio allocation for Hyperliquid dry-run.
agents.decision_owner_note: Codex manages long/short signals and portfolio allocation for Hyperliquid dry-run.

agents.name: Codex Hyperliquid Tactical
agents.philosophy: Codex tactical long/short rotation with regime-aware sizing on Hyperliquid.
agents.decision_owner_note: Codex tactical long/short rotation with regime-aware sizing on Hyperliquid.

agents.name: Codex Hyperliquid Hedge
agents.philosophy: Codex hedge agent with long/short risk-balancing bias on Hyperliquid.
agents.decision_owner_note: Codex hedge agent with long/short risk-balancing bias on Hyperliquid.

agents.name: Codex Hyperliquid MeanRev LS
agents.philosophy: Codex long/short mean-reversion rotation for liquid alts on Hyperliquid.
agents.decision_owner_note: Codex long/short mean-reversion rotation for liquid alts on Hyperliquid.

agents.name: Codex Hyperliquid Trend LS
agents.philosophy: Codex long/short trend and breakout execution on Hyperliquid majors.
agents.decision_owner_note: Codex long/short trend and breakout execution on Hyperliquid majors.

agents.name: Core Builder (DCA-like)
agents.philosophy: Build core BTC/ETH exposure with DCA-like dip buying, guarded by trend and sentiment filters, while prioritizing capital protection.

agents.name: Trend Rider (Breakout + Trend)
agents.philosophy: Trade only strong trend continuation and breakouts on SOL/BNB, concentrate risk in one position, and cut losers fast.

agents.name: Range Harvester (Mean Reversion)
agents.philosophy: Harvest range-bound pullbacks on XRP/ETH with short holding periods, strict cooldown, and tight risk exits.

news_items.excerpt: Gold has become "overextended" after climbing to more than $5,247 per ounce, according to Jan3 CEO and Bitcoin advocate Samson Mow.
news_items.title: Bitcoin undervalued relative to gold signals potential rally: Analyst

news_items.excerpt: At the iConnections conference in Miami this week, allocators signaled digital assets are now a core sleeve in alternatives.
news_items.title: Bitcoin losing trillions in value hasn't stopped traditional giants' interest in digital assets sector

news_items.excerpt: The 25-basis-point the latest monthly adjustment of STRC's dividend and comes amid a sharp downturn in the crypto markets and macroeconomic uncertainty.
news_items.title: Strategy boosts monthly STRC preferred dividend to 11.5% for March 2026

news_items.excerpt: Led by Executive Chairman Michael Saylor, the company raised the annual dividend on its widely-followed preferred STRC ("Stretch") series by 25 basis points.
news_items.title: Strategy lifts STRC dividend to 11.5% as MSTR extends monthly losing streak to 8

news_items.excerpt: Bitcoin avoided a fresh breakdown around major geopolitical events in the Middle East, with BTC price targets now including $74,000 next.
news_items.title: Bitcoin traders eye Iran reactions as oil sparks US 5% inflation forecast

news_items.excerpt: The OCC's proposal's stablecoin yield procedures are the most ambiguous in that rulemaking plan.
news_items.title: Stablecoin yield rewards (likely won't be) banned under OCC proposal: State of Crypto

news_items.excerpt: Historically, bitcoin bear markets have lasted 12-13 months, suggesting a potential downturn until late 2026 if priced in USD.
news_items.title: Bitcoin market bottom may be nearing, at least if measured against gold, analyst says

news_items.excerpt: The company holds about 8,285 bitcoin in Coinbase Prime custody, a stake now worth roughly $545 million after a $235 million decline in value over the past three months.
news_items.title: SpaceX’s $780 million bitcoin stack now down to about $545 million ahead of IPO filing

news_items.excerpt: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
news_items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

news_items.excerpt: Tokenized gold markets like PAXG and XAUt now handle nearly all gold price discovery when CME futures shut for the weekend.
news_items.title: Tokenized gold drives weekend price signals while CME futures are closed

news_items.excerpt: The US military reportedly relied on Anthropic’s Claude AI for intelligence analysis and targeting during an Iran strike hours after Trump ordered a ban on the company’s systems.
news_items.title: US military used Anthropic in Iran strike despite ban order by Trump: WSJ

news_items.excerpt: Solana led major tokens with a 10.8% bounce, while ether reclaimed $2,000 and bitcoin climbed back above $66,800 ahead of traditional futures opens on Sunday.
news_items.title: Ether, solana, xrp surge up to 10% as majors recover Saturday's war-driven losses

news_items.excerpt: The newly created Polymarket wallets placed bets on the timing of a US strike against Iran, buying shares hours before the first explosions were reported in Tehran.
news_items.title: 6 Polymarket traders net $1M on US-Iran strike, spark insider fears: Report

news_items.excerpt: Crypto markets stabilized after geopolitical shockwaves from US-Israeli air strikes on Iran rattled risk assets.
news_items.title: Bitcoin recovers to $68K following death of Iranian Supreme Leader

news_items.excerpt: A prediction market about military strikes on a sovereign nation now sits alongside presidential election bets as one of the most-traded contracts the platform has ever hosted.
news_items.title: Polymarket attracts record trading 'world' volumes as U.S.-Iran bets top $529 million

news_items.excerpt: The death of Iran's supreme leader opens the door to regime change, and markets are pricing in a shorter period of tension.
news_items.title: Bitcoin tops $68,000 after Iran confirms leader killed in U.S., Israel airstrikes

news_items.excerpt: Removing intermediaries with account abstraction is a “core principle of non-ugly cypherpunk Ethereum,” said Buterin.
news_items.title: Ethereum smart accounts are finally coming ‘within a year’ — Vitalik Buterin

news_items.excerpt: The company was the first to deploy its AI models on classified US military cloud networks, according to Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei.
news_items.title: Anthropic CEO responds to Pentagon order prohibiting military use

news_items.excerpt: Ethereum’s dominant total value locked and widespread adoption by traditional finance institutions confirm its role as the base of global onchain finance. Will Ether price follow?
news_items.title: Ether is 60% down from its 2025 high, but TradFi keeps betting on ETH: Here’s why

news_items.excerpt: Bitcoin's future hinges less on technological factors and more on how AI affects growth, employment, real interest rates, and central bank liquidity, NYDIG Research argues.
news_items.title: Here's how bitcoin's price rise could be fueled by job-stealing AI software
